title: A Long Corner Smoke
notes: Essential T-Side utility. Completely blocks off the CT AWPer angle looking from Long A Corner toward Long Doors.

title: Top Mid Xbox Smoke (From Spawn)
notes: Lands cleanly on top of Xbox. Blocks Mid doors line of sight from CT spawn, allowing safe passage to Short A.

title: B Site Doors Smoke (From T-Ramp)
notes: Blocks crossfires and early rotations coming from Mid/CT spawn during a fast B execute.

title: Deep Upper Tunnels Smoke
notes: Thrown immediately at round start to bottle up Terrorists inside Upper Tunnels and deny fast B platform rushes.

title: A Long Defensive Retake Pop-Flash
notes: Bounces off the Long corner wall perfectly to completely blind T entries pushing from Long doors toward Corner/Car.
